description_long: This object is a rectangular radiator with a robust black plastic or metal frame and a series of tightly packed, pleated white filter-like fins running horizontally across its face. The front and back surfaces are dominated by these pleated fins, which are divided into three distinct horizontal sections by the frame. The side profile reveals a relatively shallow depth, with the fins protruding slightly from the frame, giving the object a boxy yet streamlined appearance. The frame appears solid and slightly rounded at the edges, providing structural support and likely housing the internal components. There are no visible pipe connections, valves, or mounting brackets, suggesting a self-contained design. The overall finish is matte, with the fins having a slightly textured, fabric-like appearance and the frame being smooth and hard.
description: A rectangular radiator with a black frame and three sections of pleated white fins, featuring a matte finish and a compact, boxy design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the shallow depth and the three protruding pleated fin sections within the black frame.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full expanse of the pleated white fins divided into three horizontal sections by the frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, highlighting the depth and the layered fin structure.
description_view_3: Back view, nearly identical to the front, with the pleated fins and frame clearly visible.
attribute_grille_pattern: solid frame with pleated fin sections
